katzenname.label: Name der Katze
katzenname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

rasse.label: Rasse
rasse.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

geburtsdatum.label: Geburtsdatum
geburtsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

geschlecht.label: Geschlecht
geschlecht.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

farbe.label: Fellfarbe
farbe.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

besonderheiten.label: Besonderheiten / Gesundheitshinweise
besonderheiten.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

besitzer.label: Besitzer
besitzer.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Kunden' with the id `6a0c45c8906835b1ad00f90a` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a0c45c8906835b1ad00f90a/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.
